case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. KENTISHA WATSON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED SEP-28-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, KENTISHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATSON, KENTISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 954CONNECTICUT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
